subject: session date
fact: The session took place on May 9th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: May 9th, 2026

subject: Vraxen's Tower
fact: The party is engaged in combat atop the top floor of Vraxen's Tower.
source_quote: Atop the dizzying heights of Vraxen's Tower

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a powerful magic-user and the primary antagonist of the encounter.
source_quote: the cunning wizard Veris

subject: Stone Golem
fact: A Stone Golem fought alongside Veris against the party.
source_quote: his Stone Golem

subject: Daein
fact: Daein loosed arrows at Veris but failed to hit him.
source_quote: Daein loosed arrows at Veris but failed to find his mark

subject: Giant Owlbear
fact: The Giant Owlbear tore into the Stone Golem with savage fury.
source_quote: the Giant Owlbear tore into the Stone Golem with savage fury

subject: Web spell cast
fact: Veris conjured a massive cube of thick, sticky webbing that ensnared several party members.
source_quote: Veris, desperate to regain control of the battlefield, conjured a massive cube of thick, sticky webbing that ensnared several of the party members

subject: Golem freed
fact: Veris hurled a bolt of fire at the Stone Golem, burning away the webs and freeing it.
source_quote: Veris then hurled a bolt of fire at the Stone Golem itself, burning away the webs that had trapped the construct and freeing it

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon his divine gifts to mend Daein's wounds.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon his divine gifts to mend Daein's wounds

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim freed himself from the clinging webbing strands.
source_quote: free himself from the clinging strands

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur unleashed a torrent of flame from his cannon, scorching the webs.
source_quote: Felkur unleashed a torrent of flame from his cannon — scorching the webs

subject: Allies scorched
fact: Felkur's cannon blast singed Daein and the Owlbear in the process of burning the webs.
source_quote: though not without singeing Daein and the Owlbear in the process

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas turned her fury on the Stone Golem, striking it repeatedly.
source_quote: Akritas turned her fury on the Stone Golem, striking it again and again

subject: Golem destroyed
fact: The Stone Golem crumbled into rubble after being struck by Akritas.
source_quote: until the massive construct finally crumbled into rubble

subject: Veris
fact: Veris conjured an invisible wall of pure magical force around Felkur.
source_quote: he conjured an invisible wall of pure magical force around Felkur

subject: Felkur trapped
fact: Veris declared that there was no escape for Felkur.
source_quote: declaring with cold menace that there was no escape

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: A Shield Guardian lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce Veris.
source_quote: a Shield Guardian lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce the embattled wizard

subject: Demon approach
fact: The sound of demonic footsteps echoed from below the tower.
source_quote: the sound of demonic footsteps echoed from below

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim shattered Veris's magical prison with a powerful dispelling.
source_quote: Bramgrim shattered Veris's magical prison with a powerful dispelling

subject: Daein
fact: Daein's arrow found Veris, slowing the wizard's retreat.
source_quote: Daein's arrow found Veris at last, slowing the wizard's retreat

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur maneuvered his cannon down the chute toward Vraxen's library.
source_quote: Felkur, thinking ahead, maneuvered his cannon down the chute toward Vraxen's precious library far below

subject: Cannon diversion plan
fact: Felkur intended to detonate the cannon as a diversion to draw the archmage away from the battle.
source_quote: intending to detonate it as a diversion that would draw the archmage away from the battle entirely

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: The Owlbear seized the moment to hurl the Shield Guardian to the ground.
source_quote: The Owlbear seized the moment to hurl the Shield Guardian to the ground

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas cut Veris down with a final volley of magically-laced thorns.
source_quote: Akritas, with a final volley of magically-laced thorns, cut Veris down

subject: Veris death
fact: Veris was killed just before he could unleash a devastating burst of fire upon the party.
source_quote: just before he could unleash a devastating burst of fire upon the party

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: The Shield Guardian clambered back to its feet after Veris died.
source_quote: the Shield Guardian, which clambered back to its feet

subject: Shield Guardian attack
fact: The Shield Guardian swung at Bramgrim but missed entirely.
source_quote: swung at Bramgrim — only to miss entirely

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's protective spirits swarmed the Shield Guardian, tearing into it with ghostly fury.
source_quote: Bramgrim's protective spirits swarmed the construct as it moved, tearing into it with ghostly fury

subject: Barrier attempt
fact: The party scrambled to use one of Felkur's precious magical tokens to conjure a barrier across the stairwell entrance.
source_quote: The party scrambled to use one of Felkur's precious magical tokens to conjure a barrier across the stairwell entrance

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: A Mezzoloth burst onto the tower top before the barrier could be raised.
source_quote: a Mezzoloth — a fearsome demon clad in chitinous armor — burst onto the tower top

subject: Poison cloud
fact: The Mezzoloth immediately exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas that washed over the entire party.
source_quote: immediately exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas that washed over the entire party

subject: Poison resistance
fact: Most of the adventurers managed to resist the worst of the venom.
source_quote: Most of the adventurers managed to resist the worst of the venom

subject: Concentration threat
fact: The poison cloud lingered, threatening to unravel Bramgrim's concentration.
source_quote: the cloud lingered, threatening to unravel Bramgrim's concentration

subject: Veris
fact: Veris moved across the battlefield and conjured a Wall of Force to trap Felkur.
source_quote: Veris moves across the battlefield and conjures a Wall of Force to trap Felkur

subject: Veris
fact: Veris declared, 'Now, Felkur, there is no escape.'
source_quote: Now, Felkur, there is no escape.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considered dropping his cannon down the chute to detonate it in the library below.
source_quote: Felkur considers dropping his cannon down the chute to detonate it in the library below

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim successfully cast Dispel Magic at a high level to shatter Veris's Wall of Force.
source_quote: Bramgrim successfully casts Dispel Magic at a high level, shattering Veris's Wall of Force

subject: Daein
fact: Daein struck Veris with a prepared bow shot, slowing the wizard's movement.
source_quote: Daein strikes Veris with a prepared bow shot, slowing the wizard's movement

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: The Owlbear shoved the Shield Guardian, knocking the massive construct prone.
source_quote: The Owlbear shoves the Shield Guardian, knocking the massive construct prone

subject: Magical Token
fact: The party used one of Felkur's magical tokens to conjure a Scroll of Wall of Force.
source_quote: The party uses one of Felkur's magical tokens to conjure a Scroll of Wall of Force

subject: Veris
fact: Veris unleashed a powerful firebolt at Akritas as a legendary action.
source_quote: Veris unleashes a powerful firebolt at Akritas as a legendary action

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used a protective field to mitigate the damage dealt to Akritas.
source_quote: Daein uses a protective field to mitigate the damage dealt to Akritas

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas retaliated with her bow, striking Veris and marking him with Hunter's Mark.
source_quote: Akritas retaliates with her bow, striking Veris and marking him with Hunter's Mark

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas finished Veris off with a Hail of Thorns.
source_quote: Akritas finishes Veris off with a Hail of Thorns

subject: Veris fireball prevented
fact: Akritas killed Veris before he could cast a fireball.
source_quote: killing the wizard before he can cast a fireball

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: The Shield Guardian stood up and marched toward Bramgrim.
source_quote: The Shield Guardian stands up, marches toward Bramgrim

subject: Shield Guardian misses
fact: The Shield Guardian attempted to strike Bramgrim twice but missed both attacks.
source_quote: attempts to strike him twice but misses both attacks

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: The Shield Guardian moved to clear the stairwell entrance and took damage from Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians.
source_quote: The Shield Guardian moves to clear the stairwell entrance, exposing itself to attacks of opportunity and taking damage from Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: A Mezzoloth emerged from the stairwell along with other demonic cannon fodder.
source_quote: A Mezzoloth emerges from the stairwell along with other demonic cannon fodder

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: The Mezzoloth took damage from Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians as it entered the area.
source_quote: The Mezzoloth takes damage from Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians as it enters the area

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: The Mezzoloth immediately cast Cloudkill, filling the area with a billowing cloud of poisonous gas.
source_quote: The Mezzoloth immediately casts Cloudkill, filling the area with a billowing cloud of poisonous gas

subject: Poison saving throws
fact: The Cloudkill forced the party to make Constitution saving throws.
source_quote: forcing the party to make Constitution saving throws

subject: Giant Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear took the full brunt of the poison damage.
source_quote: but the Owlbear takes the full brunt of the damage

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim struggled to maintain concentration on his Spirit Guardians after being caught in the poisonous cloud.
source_quote: Bramgrim struggles to maintain concentration on his Spirit Guardians after being caught in the poisonous cloud

subject: Session pause
fact: The session paused mid-round as the party prepared their next moves.
source_quote: The session pauses mid-round as the party prepares their next moves against the encroaching demonic forces

subject: Roll20 bug
fact: The Roll20 interface entered a bizarre loop, scrolling endlessly left and locking the GM out of the map.
source_quote: The Roll20 interface entered a bizarre loop, scrolling endlessly left and locking the GM out of the map mid-combat

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur joked with the GM, asking if they accidentally installed ClaudeBot.
source_quote: Did you accidentally install ClaudeBot?

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur apologized for potentially killing his allies with his cannon blast.
source_quote: My bad, guys. I'm sorry if I kill you.

subject: Vraxen's library
fact: The library is located far below Vraxen's Tower and is accessible via a chute.
source_quote: Vraxen's precious library far below

subject: Wand of Web
fact: Veris used a Wand of Web to conjure a massive 20-foot cube of sticky, flammable webbing.
source_quote: Veris uses a legendary action to cast Web, filling a 20-foot cube with sticky, flammable strands

subject: Felkur's Cannon
fact: Felkur used his cannon to unleash a flamethrower blast that burned away the magical webs.
source_quote: Felkur uses his cannon to unleash a flamethrower blast, burning away the webs restraining the party

subject: Felkur's Cannon
fact: Felkur moved his cannon down the passageway toward the library chute as a planned diversion.
source_quote: Felkur moves his cannon down the passageway toward the library chute as a planned diversion

subject: Special Orb
fact: Felkur previously stole a Special Orb that grants a bonus to ability checks involving artificer abilities.
source_quote: An item previously stolen by Felkur that grants a bonus to ability checks involving artificer abilities

subject: Special Orb
fact: The party determined the Special Orb did not affect spell save DC.
source_quote: ultimately determining it did not

subject: Magical Token
fact: Felkur possesses a magical token that produces a Scroll of Wall of Force when used.
source_quote: A consumable token belonging to Felkur that, when used, produced a Scroll of Wall of Force

subject: Scroll of Wall of Force
fact: The party used a token to obtain a Scroll of Wall of Force to block incoming demonic reinforcements.
source_quote: The party used it to create a barrier to block incoming demonic reinforcements from the stairwell

subject: Teleport system weakness
fact: Felkur's manipulation of the teleport system has weakened the tower's protections, allowing Veris to teleport unexpectedly.
source_quote: Felkur's manipulation of the teleport system has weakened the tower's protections, allowing Veris to teleport unexpectedly

subject: Teleport system weakness
fact: The teleport system issue was flagged for later in the adventure.
source_quote: a problem flagged for later in the adventure

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: The Mezzoloth is a fearsome demon clad in chitinous armor.
source_quote: a fearsome demon clad in chitinous armor

subject: Demonic reinforcements
fact: Demonic reinforcements are surging upward from below the tower.
source_quote: wave of demons surging upward
